t.t: CR Farm Products | Tropical Agricultural Exports from Costa Rica
CR Farm Products — GLOBALG.A.P. certified exporter of cassava, eddoes, malanga, taro and tropical roots from Costa Rica. Serving importers and distributors in the USA, Europe and Caribbean.

div.h1:
Your Reliable Partner for
Tropical Agricultural
Exports
div.p: GLOBALG.A.P. certified exporter of cassava, eddoes, malanga, taro and tropical roots. Serving importers, distributors and supermarket chains in the USA, Europe and the Caribbean.

div.p: Grown in Costa Rica's volcanic highlands — consistent quality, year-round availability

div.class: d-flex gap-3 flex-wrap justify-content-center crfarm-reveal crfarm-reveal-delay-1

div.p: Full food safety traceability from our fields to your port. Required certification for European retail chains and US importers.
EU-spec 20 kg boxes and USA 40 lb boxes. Custom sizing available. Peeled vacuum-packed and IQF frozen formats for foodservice.
Direct FCL and LCL shipments from Puerto Limón. FOB, CIF, CFR and DAP incoterms available. Experienced logistics team.
Costa Rica's equatorial climate and volcanic soil enable continuous harvest. No seasonal gaps for your supply chain.
Powered by renewable energy. Environmentally responsible practices certified by Esencial Costa Rica country brand program.
Founded in 2005 by the Vega brothers. Direct owner relationships, responsive communication, and long-term partnership focus.
Contact our export team for pricing, samples, and technical specifications.

t.t: About CR Farm Products | Costa Rican Agricultural Exporter
CR Farm Products VYM S.A. — family-owned Costa Rican exporter of tropical root vegetables. GLOBALG.A.P. certified since 2005.

div.p: A Costa Rican family committed to delivering the world's finest tropical roots

div.h2: From the Volcanic Highlands of San Carlos
div.p: CR Farm Products VYM S.A. was founded in 2005 by four brothers from San Carlos, Costa Rica — a region known for its fertile volcanic soil, high rainfall, and ideal agroclimatic conditions for tropical root vegetables.
What started as a small family farm has grown into a professionally managed export operation serving importers, distributors, and supermarket chains in the United States, Europe, and the Caribbean.
We operate our own packing facility, maintain full traceability from field to container, and hold GLOBALG.A.P. certification — the standard demanded by European retail chains and major US importers.
International food safety standard covering crop production, handling, and traceability. Required by European retailers including Tesco, Carrefour, and Lidl.
Official Costa Rican country brand recognizing companies that embody sustainability, innovation, and quality. Awarded by PROCOMER.
Certified Small and Medium Enterprise by the Costa Rican Ministry of Economy, Industry and Commerce. Eligible for export promotion programs.

t.t: The story of CR Farm Products — from a San Carlos family farm to an international tropical agricultural exporter serving the USA, Europe and Caribbean.

div.p: The Vega family has farmed the highlands of San Carlos, Alajuela, for generations. The region's volcanic soil, abundant rainfall, and tropical climate create ideal conditions for root vegetables — knowledge passed down from generation to generation.

div.div: CR Farm Products VYM S.A. Founded
div.p: Four brothers formalize the family operation as CR Farm Products VYM S.A. The company begins exporting cassava and eddoes to the US Hispanic market through established importers in Miami and New York.

The company adds malanga lila, malanga isleña, big taro, ñame, and yampi to its export portfolio. Investment in a dedicated packing and cold-chain facility in San Carlos enables consistent quality and capacity for full-container shipments.

CR Farm Products achieves GLOBALG.A.P. certification — a prerequisite for supplying European retail chains. This opens the door to markets in Spain, the UK, Italy, and the Netherlands, where demand for ethnic tropical vegetables is growing rapidly.
Recognized with the Esencial Costa Rica country brand for sustainable practices and commitment to quality. Also certified as PYME Costa Rica, qualifying for export support programs by PROCOMER.

Investment in renewable energy for sustainable operations. Expansion of the peeled and frozen product line for foodservice and food processing clients. Implementation of ERP system (Odoo) for full supply-chain traceability and buyer portal access.

CR Farm Products exports year-round to buyers in the USA, Canada, Europe, and the Caribbean. The company maintains direct buyer relationships and offers competitive FOB, CIF, and DAP pricing with 3–5 week lead times from order to delivery at destination port.

div.h2: Be Part of Our Next Chapter

t.t: Technical specifications for all CR Farm Products: cassava, eddoes, malanga, taro, yam. HS codes, packaging by market, available formats.

div.p: Full technical specifications for international buyers and importers
We offer FOB Puerto Limón (CR), CFR, CIF, and DAP to major ports in the USA, Europe and Caribbean. Contact us for specific port pricing.

t.t: Photos from CR Farm Products fields, packing facility, and export operations in San Carlos, Costa Rica.

div.p: Fields, packing facility, and export operations in San Carlos, Costa Rica
More photos available upon request. Contact us for full resolution images and video tours of our facility.

t.t: CR Farm Products holds GLOBALG.A.P., Esencial Costa Rica, and PYME Costa Rica certifications — guaranteeing food safety, sustainability, and quality for international buyers.

div.p: International standards that guarantee food safety, traceability and sustainability

div.h3: The Global Standard for Food Safety
div.p: GLOBALG.A.P. is the world's leading farm assurance program, ensuring food safety and sustainability in agricultural production. The standard covers over 135 countries and is required by virtually all European supermarket chains.
CR Farm Products holds GLOBALG.A.P. certification covering:

ul.li: Crop protection product management and application records
Full traceability from field to post-harvest handling

div.p: Accepted by: Tesco, Carrefour, Lidl, Walmart, Whole Foods, and 50,000+ other retailers globally.

Esencial Costa Rica is the official country brand of Costa Rica, promoted by PROCOMER (Costa Rican Investment and Trade Development Agency). It recognizes companies that embody the values of sustainability, excellence, and innovation associated with the Costa Rican brand.
To qualify, companies must demonstrate:

ul.li: Innovation in processes or product development
Contribution to Costa Rica's reputation internationally

div.p: Benefit for buyers: Assurance that CR Farm Products meets Costa Rica's high environmental and quality standards — and qualifies for PROCOMER export promotion programs.

PYME (Pequeña y Mediana Empresa) certification is granted by Costa Rica's Ministry of Economy, Industry and Commerce (MEIC). It officially recognizes CR Farm Products as a certified Small and Medium Enterprise.
This certification provides access to:

ul.li: PROCOMER export promotion and market access programs
Priority participation in international trade fairs

div.p: We can provide official certificate copies, export documentation, and phytosanitary certificates upon request.

t.t: Contact Us | CR Farm Products Export Inquiries
Contact CR Farm Products for export pricing, samples, and import inquiries. We serve importers, distributors and supermarket chains in the USA, Europe and Caribbean.

div.p: Tell us about your import needs and we'll respond within 24 hours

form.p: We respond within 24 business hours. By submitting this form you agree to be contacted by our export team.
